items.title: Alcaraz (wrist) withdraws from Barcelona Open
items.summary: Carlos Alcaraz withdrew from the Barcelona Open after undergoing a test on his right wrist, the tournament announced Wednesday.

items.title: Source: Ekitike ruptures Achilles, misses WC
items.summary: Hugo Ekitike will miss the World Cup and be out for at least nine months after he ruptured his Achilles tendon on Tuesday night, a source told ESPN.

items.title: GB's Cairess out of London Marathon with injury
